## Test plan

<!-- All CI checks must be green before requesting review. -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format --check` pass
- [ ] `pylint recut` passes (score ≥ 8.0)
- [ ] `mypy recut` passes
- [ ] `pip-audit` shows no new vulnerabilities
- [ ] `bandit -r recut -ll -ii` shows no new findings
